name: kazan-event-radar
description: Telegram bot that monitors Kazan events, places, restaurants, viewpoints, and hidden gems from configured sources.

scripts.check: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-ChildItem src -Recurse -Filter *.js | ForEach-Object { node --check $_.FullName }; Get-ChildItem public -Recurse -Filter *.js | ForEach-Object { node --check $_.FullName }"
